name: Soul
ability: Each night, the Soul may choose what alive player holds the Soul & "is the Demon". The Soul is evil until the player they chose chooses a player. [No Minions]
flavor: YUCK!! Why is it so slimy?! (v1.2)
firstNightReminder: The Soul may choose a player. :reminder: :reminder: Put them to sleep. If necessary, wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* & Soul tokens & give a thumbs-down.
otherNightReminder: The Soul may choose a player. :reminder: :reminder: Put them to sleep. If necessary, wake the player marked *HEALING* & give a thumbs-up. Put them to sleep. Wake the target. Show the *YOU ARE* & Soul tokens & give a thumbs-down.
